message:
test(readme): cover SQL options-bearing read/write fns (fd90.289 / br-a7vp7)

Extends readme_quick_start_round_trip_through_sqlite to actually call
4 SQL functions previously in prelude but never exercised:

- write_sql_with_options(&df, &conn, "results_v2", &SqlWriteOptions {
    if_exists: SqlIfExists::Replace,
    index: false,
    method: SqlInsertMethod::Single,
    ...
  }) — constructs the full SqlWriteOptions struct (7 fields)
- read_sql_with_options(&conn, sql, &SqlReadOptions::default())
- read_sql_query(&conn, sql) — standalone form (no table-name lookup)
- read_sql_table_with_options(&conn, table, &SqlReadOptions::default())

Verified: 36 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
